_comment: Defaults for `python -m cli filter`. The model name is a key in models/registry.py::MODELS; vllm_concurrency=null means use spec.recommended_concurrency. n_votes>1 enables majority-vote filtering: every run is persisted under cache/filter/<spec>__voteN/, with the top-level usable verdict precomputed at write time (threshold = ceil(N/2)).
